untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'System popularity indicator' (percentage of trend followers closing positions) and 'price deviation in standard deviations' which are not in the allowed indicator list. These are synthetic/composite indicators not directly available. RSI divergence detection (price new high, RSI lower high) requires multi-bar comparison logic not expressible with simple 3-field conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available indicators: entry condition approximates exhaustion via RSI divergence concept using close vs sma_200 positioning and rsi_14 comparison. Exit uses price return to 200-day MA. However, the core logic requiring 'consensus of trend followers' and 'standard deviation bands' cannot be accurately expressed without custom indicator definitions. Signal is fundamentally untranslatable to the allowed operator/indicator set.
